questions.text: Which tissue is responsible for movement in our body?
questions.explanation: Muscular tissue is responsible for movement in our body. It contains contractile proteins that enable movement.
Xylem is the vascular tissue that conducts water and minerals from roots to other parts of the plant.

questions.correctAnswer: A group of cells similar in structure and function working together.
questions.explanation: A tissue is a group of similar cells that work together to perform a specific function. Examples: muscle tissue, nervous tissue.

questions.text: ________ tissue connects different tissues in the body.
questions.explanation: Connective tissue connects, supports, and binds other tissues. Examples: blood, bone, cartilage, adipose tissue.
